scripts.test: npm run build && AGENTIO_0G_SKIP_LIVE=1 node --test packages/*/dist/*.test.js
scripts.noir:execute: npm run noir:fixture && cd packages/noir/circuits/authorization && nargo execute
scripts.noir:proof-smoke: npm run noir:compile && npm run build && node packages/noir/dist/proof-smoke.js
scripts.noir:proof-contract: npm run noir:compile && npm run build && node packages/noir/dist/proof-adapter-smoke.js
scripts.example:real-noir: npm run noir:compile && npm run build && node examples/basic/dist/real-noir-proof.js
scripts.example:real-noir-peer: npm run noir:compile && npm run build && node examples/basic/dist/real-noir-peer-verification.js
scripts.test:og:live: npm run build && AGENTIO_0G_RUN_LIVE=1 node --test --test-concurrency=1 packages/og/dist/file-client.test.js packages/og/dist/network-client.test.js
scripts.test:og:live:file: npm run build && AGENTIO_0G_RUN_LIVE=1 node --test packages/og/dist/file-client.test.js
scripts.test:og:live:kv: npm run build && AGENTIO_0G_RUN_LIVE=1 node --test packages/og/dist/network-client.test.js
